analysis.reasoning: Core message: China commits to carbon neutrality by 2060 and to China–EU high-level dialogue on environment/climate, proposing a joint 'green silk road' to promote global sustainable development. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet highlights cooperative international engagement, multilateral dialogue with the EU, and contributing to global sustainable development, portraying China as a constructive, benevolent actor. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Partially related to policy goals but no explicit claim of domestic success or leadership; focus is on intentions/cooperation, so not applicable. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
